ohtani.title: Shohei Ohtani tosses six scoreless in Dodgers' win
ohtani.blurb: Shohei Ohtani fans six over six scoreless innings and Kyle Tucker launches a two-run homer to lead the Dodgers to a 7-0 win over the D-backs

imanaga.title: Craig Counsell recaps Cubs' comeback victory
imanaga.blurb: Craig Counsell talks about Shota Imanaga's start, the inside-the-park home run, and the Cubs' 9th inning comeback to win the game

suzuki.title: Craig Counsell recaps Cubs' comeback victory
suzuki.blurb: Craig Counsell talks about Shota Imanaga's start, the inside-the-park home run, and the Cubs' 9th inning comeback to win the game

yoshida.title: Five-run inning lifts Red Sox to win
yoshida.blurb: Boston's five-run inning, powered by Wilyer Abreu's two-run homer, lifts the Red Sox to a 8-1 win over the Orioles

okamoto.title: Chad Dallas leads Blue Jays to 7-2 win in debut
okamoto.blurb: Chad Dallas earns the win in his Major League debut and Myles Straw drives in three runs in the Blue Jays' 7-2 win over the Braves

murakami.title: Miguel Vargas hits a walk-off homer in White Sox win
murakami.blurb: Miguel Vargas hits a walk-off homer in the 10th inning and Rikuu Nishida collects his first RBI in the White Sox 4-3 win over the Tigers

matsui.title: García, Wheeler power Phillies to 6-4 win
matsui.blurb: Adolis García hits a home run and Zack Wheeler strikes out eight in the Phillies' 6-4 win to sweep the Padres
